text:
Author: issyl0
Date: Fri Sep 27 08:26:35 2013
New Revision: 42717
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/42717

Log:
  Add a missing word to the description of KMyMoney in the Handbook.
  
  PR:		docs/182003

Modified:
  head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/desktop/chapter.xml

Modified: head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/desktop/chapter.xml
==============================================================================
--- head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/desktop/chapter.xml	Fri Sep 27 08:03:30 2013	(r42716)
+++ head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/desktop/chapter.xml	Fri Sep 27 08:26:35 2013	(r42717)
@@ -1272,7 +1272,7 @@
 
       <para><ulink
 	  url="http://kmymoney2.sourceforge.net">KMyMoney</ulink>
-	is a personal finance created by the
+	is a personal finance application created by the
 	<application>KDE</application> community.
 	<application>KMyMoney</application> intends to provide and
 	incorporate all the important features found in commercial
